test_cases.title: End-to-end: Guest order placement with valid data (Happy Path)

steps.action: Navigate to https://demo.nopcommerce.com/
Search for 'Apple MacBook Pro'
Click on 'Apple MacBook Pro' product
Set quantity to 1 and click 'Add to Cart'
steps.expected: Product added to cart with success notification

steps.action: Navigate to shopping cart and click Checkout
Select 'Checkout as Guest'
Fill billing form: Demo Test, demo@test.com, 2458 Sunset Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90028, US, 9876543210
steps.expected: Form is filled with valid data

steps.action: Click Continue on billing step
Select first available shipping method and click Continue
Select Credit Card and click Continue
Enter card details: Demo, 4242424242424242, 01/2030, 123 and click Continue
Review order summary and click 'Confirm Order'
steps.expected: Order is placed and Thank You page loads

steps.action: Verify order number is displayed on Thank You page
steps.expected: Order number is shown confirming successful placement

test_cases.expected_result: Complete guest order is placed successfully and Thank You page with order number is shown
test_cases.remarks: This is the primary smoke test for the entire checkout flow

test_cases.title: Verify search field is protected against XSS injection

steps.action: Navigate to https://demo.nopcommerce.com/
Enter XSS payload '<script>alert("XSS")</script>' in the search field
Click Search button
steps.expected: Page handles input without executing the script

steps.action: Verify no alert dialog appears and page remains functional
steps.expected: No script execution occurs; payload is treated as text

test_cases.expected_result: XSS payload is not executed; input is sanitized or escaped properly

test_cases.title: Verify billing form fields are protected against SQL injection

steps.action: Enter SQL injection payload "' OR '1'='1" in the First Name field
Fill remaining fields with valid data
Click Continue
steps.expected: System handles input without SQL error or data breach

steps.action: Verify no database error is returned and application remains stable
steps.expected: Application is stable; no SQL error messages exposed

test_cases.expected_result: SQL injection payload is sanitized; no database errors or unauthorized access occurs

test_cases.title: Verify payment page is served over HTTPS and card data is not exposed in URL
preconditions: User is on payment information page

steps.action: Navigate to the payment information step of checkout
Verify the page URL starts with 'https://'
Enter card number and submit form
Verify the browser address bar does not contain card number or CVV
steps.expected: Card data is NOT visible in the URL

steps.action: Verify browser network requests do not send card data in plain text GET parameters
steps.expected: Card data is sent via POST over HTTPS only

test_cases.expected_result: Payment page is HTTPS and no sensitive card data is exposed in URLs or HTTP logs

test_cases.title: Verify homepage loads within 3 seconds

steps.action: Start performance measurement timer
Navigate to https://demo.nopcommerce.com/
Record time until page is fully loaded (DOMContentLoaded and Load events)
Verify load time is under 3000 milliseconds

test_cases.expected_result: Homepage loads within 3 seconds under normal network conditions
test_cases.remarks: Use Playwright's built-in timing APIs or browser devtools for measurement

test_cases.title: Verify search results page loads within 3 seconds

steps.action: Navigate to homepage
Enter search keyword and submit
Measure time from search submission to search results page fully loaded
Verify load time is under 3000 milliseconds
steps.expected: Search results load in under 3 seconds

test_cases.expected_result: Search results page loads within 3 seconds

test_cases.title: Verify checkout pages load within 3 seconds each

steps.action: Navigate to cart and record time to checkout page load
Proceed through billing and record billing step load time
Proceed through shipping and record shipping step load time
Proceed to payment and record payment step load time
Verify each step loads in under 3000 milliseconds
steps.expected: All checkout steps load under 3 seconds

test_cases.expected_result: Each checkout step page loads within 3 seconds

test_cases.title: Verify complete guest checkout flow works in Chromium browser
preconditions: Chromium browser is installed and available

steps.action: Launch Playwright with Chromium browser
Navigate to https://demo.nopcommerce.com/
Search for 'Apple MacBook Pro', add to cart, proceed to checkout as guest
Fill billing, shipping, payment details and confirm order
Verify Thank You page with order number

test_cases.expected_result: Full guest checkout completes successfully in Chromium

test_cases.title: Verify complete guest checkout flow works in Firefox browser
preconditions: Firefox browser is installed and available via Playwright

steps.action: Launch Playwright with Firefox browser
Navigate to https://demo.nopcommerce.com/
Search for 'Apple MacBook Pro', add to cart, proceed to checkout as guest
steps.expected: Cart and checkout flow works in Firefox

steps.action: Fill billing, shipping, payment details and confirm order
Verify Thank You page with order number

test_cases.expected_result: Full guest checkout completes successfully in Firefox

test_cases.title: Verify complete guest checkout flow works in WebKit (Safari) browser
preconditions: WebKit browser engine is available via Playwright

steps.action: Launch Playwright with WebKit browser engine
Navigate to https://demo.nopcommerce.com/
Search for 'Apple MacBook Pro', add to cart, proceed to checkout as guest
steps.expected: Cart and checkout flow works in WebKit

steps.action: Fill billing, shipping, payment details and confirm order
Verify Thank You page with order number

test_cases.expected_result: Full guest checkout completes successfully in WebKit
test_cases.remarks: WebKit engine simulates Safari behavior; actual Safari testing recommended on macOS
